category_sources: source_facts.description says it scans Git repositories or filesystems for secrets in commit histories; official GitHub README says Squealer is intended to run locally or in CI and shows secret-detection rules.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is squealer; official GitHub repository and command examples use Squealer/squealer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, configuration, scan examples, and Docker usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/owenrumney/squealer; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Git/filesystem secret scanning; official GitHub README documents scanning remote repositories, local directories, CI usage, and secret rules.
